headline: Amphenol Announces Details of Open Offer for ADC India Communications Limited
summary: WALLINGFORD, Conn., April 01, 2026--Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) (the "Company" or "Amphenol"), as part of its completed acquisition (the "CCS Acquisition") of the Connectivity and Cable Solutions business from Vistance Networks, Inc. (formerly known as CommScope Holding Company, Inc., or "Seller"), had previously announced its open offer to acquire up to 1,196,000 fully paid-up equity shares of face value of INR 10 of ADC India Communications Limited (the "Target Company"), representing 26.

(formerly known as CommScope Holding Company, Inc., or "Seller"), had previously announced its open offer to acquire up to 1,196,000 fully paid-up equity shares of face value of INR 10 of ADC India Communications Limited (the "Target Company"), representing 26.
